steps.title: Calculate the quantity sold at the new price
steps.content:
The price increases by \$12 − $9 = $3.

For every $1 price increase, 8 fewer bags are sold:
$$3 \times 8 = 24 \text{ fewer bags}$$

New quantity at $12:
$$80 - 24 = 56 \text{ bags}$$

steps.title: Calculate revenue at the new price
steps.content:
Revenue = price × number sold:
$$12 \times 56 = 672$$

The estimated revenue is 672 dollars.
